methodology: Empirical validation of S186 simulation cap=4 recommendation against 320 sessions of live DOMEX lane data

validation_verdict.interpretation: Natural WIP converges to ~3.5 avg with mode=4, confirming S186 simulation. 80% of sessions operate at or below cap=4 without enforcement. System self-organizes near theoretical optimum. Cap=4 is both recommended and emergent.
validation_verdict.effect_size: Natural behavior matches simulation within 0.5 lanes (3.5 vs 4.0). No enforcement needed — the optimum is an attractor.

successor: F-OPS2 (scheduling policy) remains open. WIP cap=4 can be treated as structural constant for scheduling models.
